MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) New Delhi, the 26th February, 1991 G.SR. 90(E) .—-1n exercise of powers conferred by sub-section ( 1) and clause (0) of subsection (2) of section 112 of the Railways Adt,1989 (24 of 1989) the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railways (Extentof Monetary Liability and Prescription of Percen- tage Charge) Rules, 1990,11ar'nely —— , 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railways (Extent of Monetary LiahL ‘ lity and Piescription of Percentage Charge) Amendment Rules, T 1991. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publidation in the ‘ Official Gazette. 2. Under Column (1) of Part I of Schedule II of the Railways (Extent of Monetary Liability and Prescription of Percentage Charge) Rules, 1990,—- (a) 1n serial number 6 for the welds “Currency notes and coins” the words “Currency notes and coins other than Goxernment Treasure’ shall be substituted. (b) in serial number 7 for the Words “Government stamps” the words Government stamps and stamped paper other than postal stationery and stamps” shall be substituted. S. K. MALIK, It. Director, "(Railway‘Act Revision) Railway Board.
